title: Anthropic Just Dropped a Masterclass on Building Agent Harnesses (for Large Codebases)
summary: Cole Medin builds out Anthropic's published playbook for integrating Claude Code into large codebases. The core insight is that the harness architecture (context, configuration, tooling) matters more than the base model, implemented via a layered system with self-improving hooks, scoped skills, LSP, MCP servers, and subagents.
